_howToAddAPost: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the blog. To publish a new post: (1) add ONE entry to the 'posts' array below; (2) copy posts/_template.html to posts/<slug>.html and fill it in. blog.html renders the cards from this file, newest first by 'date'. Fields per entry: slug (matches posts/<slug>.html and the URL), title, date (YYYY-MM-DD), readingTime (free text e.g. '4 min read', optional), tags (array of 1-2 short strings -> pills), excerpt (1-2 sentences), featureImage (path like 'Images/my-post.jpg' or '' for the designed placeholder), featured (true for the one large post at top; keep at most one true). OPTIONAL 'url': set this when the post is its own standalone page (e.g. 'ml-roadmap.html') instead of posts/<slug>.html. See README-blog.md.

posts.title: ML Engineer Roadmap
posts.excerpt: The exact learning path I'm following to become a Machine Learning Engineer — 9 free DeepLearning.AI courses, curated and sequenced for what the industry hires for in 2025–2026.

posts.title: Agentic AI Builder
posts.excerpt: A reusable skill that turns vague agent ideas into MVP-first, production-minded plans — with tools, RAG, reflection, evals, traces, and portfolio-ready docs.
